languages.text: "Ваших пайков хватит на первое время. Затем вы отправитесь отрабатывать свои грехи в одну из колоний".

traits.locale_text: "Ваших пайков хватит на первое время. Затем вы отправитесь отрабатывать свои грехи в одну из колоний".
"Ваших пайков хватит на первое время. Затем вы отправитесь отрабатывать свои грехи в одну из колоний".

languages.text: "Your rations should last for a while longer. Once they run out, you will go to one of the colonies and atone for your misdeeds with labour."
languages.original_text: "Ваших пайков хватит на первое время. Затем вы отправитесь отрабатывать свои грехи в одну из колоний".

traits.locale_text: "Your rations should last for a while longer. Once they run out, you will go to one of the colonies and atone for your sins with labor."
"Your rations should last for a while longer. Once they run out, you will go to one of the colonies and atone for your sins with labor."
"Your rations should last for a while longer. Once they run out, you will go to one of the colonies and atone for your misdeeds with labour."

languages.text: "Eure Rationen sollten noch eine Weile reichen. Wenn sie zur Neige gehen, wirst du in eine der Kolonien gehen und mit Arbeit für deine Missetaten büßen."
languages.original_text: "Your rations should last for a while longer. Once they run out, you will go to one of the colonies and atone for your misdeeds with labour."

languages.text: "Vos rations devraient durer encore un peu. Une fois qu'elles seront épuisées, vous irez dans l'une des colonies et vous expierez vos méfaits par le travail."
languages.original_text: "Your rations should last for a while longer. Once they run out, you will go to one of the colonies and atone for your misdeeds with labour."

languages.text: "你们的口粮应该还能维持一段时间。一旦口粮用完，你们就得去某个殖民地 用劳动来弥补你们的过失。"
languages.original_text: "Your rations should last for a while longer. Once they run out, you will go to one of the colonies and atone for your misdeeds with labour."

languages.text: "Tus raciones deberían durar un tiempo más. Cuando se acaben, irás a una de las colonias y expiarás tus fechorías con trabajo".
languages.original_text: "Your rations should last for a while longer. Once they run out, you will go to one of the colonies and atone for your misdeeds with labour."

languages.text: 「配給はもうしばらく持つはずだ。食料が尽きたら、コロニーのひとつに行き、労働によって悪行を償うのだ"
languages.original_text: "Your rations should last for a while longer. Once they run out, you will go to one of the colonies and atone for your misdeeds with labour."

languages.text: "Tayınlarınız bir süre daha yetecektir. Onlar bittiğinde kolonilerden birine gidecek ve işlediğiniz kabahatlerin kefaretini çalışarak ödeyeceksiniz."
languages.original_text: "Your rations should last for a while longer. Once they run out, you will go to one of the colonies and atone for your misdeeds with labour."
